title: phragmites altissimus
intro: Phragmites altissimus, also known as tall reed grass, is a plant species in the genus Phragmites, commonly found in wetlands and marshy areas. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phragmites altissimus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and promote wound healing. Phragmites altissimus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its aerial parts can be used to make essential oils and salves for topical application.
